title: pycnocomon leucanthum
intro: Pycnocomon leucanthum, also known as white heath Bedstraw, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pycnocomon leucanthum include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
